full_text:
Cell count 1)

total: 3.47 E5

live: 2.67 E5

viability: 76.9 %

size: 9.6 um

Cell count 2):

total: 3.27 E5

live: 2.38 E5

viability: 73 %

size: 8.9 um

Average cell count: 3.45 E5 / mL * 10 (dilution)

Total cell count: 3.45 E6 / mL mL

A) RNA/DNA extraction (20 drops) + FFPE sample (4 drops) + Flow organoid (24drops):

48-well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE + flow: 48 wells x 40 µl x = 1920 µl → round up to 2000 uL

1000 cells/µl = 2.0 E6

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 1000 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 295 uL

ORG full medium → 538 uL

ome-gel → 141 µl

aprotinin → 3 µl

thrombin → 3 µl

fibrinogen → 20 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 0.7E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer for antibody stain and unstained cells each

NB: Antibody panel used for flow analysis was for tumor-iPDO comparison not the drug treatment panel.

Drops plated on 48well suspension culture plates (CellStaar #677102)

Day 4

On day 4, cells were harvested for Flow cytometry, DNA, RNA isolation, and FFPE blocks.

For flow cytometry, tumor-iPDO comparison antibody panel was used along with new compensation and unstained control.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (un stain) | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA
